time_zone: local laboratory computer time, as recorded in source files

modalities.thermal: PNG frames extracted from Application 1 video
modalities.gas_analyser: ENERAC 700-EMS rows matched by nearest timestamp

synchronization.rgb_ir_pairing: Each RGB image is paired to the nearest unused IR image by hexadecimal camera tick.
synchronization.rgb_ir_timestamp: Application 3 start time plus camera tick offset from the first observed RGB/IR tick in that run.
synchronization.thermal_frame: Nearest video frame index from Application 1 start time and OpenCV-reported FPS.
synchronization.gas_row: Nearest gas analyser row by wall-clock timestamp.

dataset_manifest.csv.fuel: Fuel folder name from source data.
dataset_manifest.csv.sync_timestamp: Mean timestamp of paired RGB and IR camera ticks.
dataset_manifest.csv.thermal_path: Curated relative thermal PNG frame path.
dataset_manifest.csv.gas_*: Matched gas analyser raw and numeric fields.
